This item can be used in tradeskills.

# Oct 10 2007 at 5:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258588351
Scholar
223 posts
I believe this is part of the new recipe for the Elaborate (required Lvl 65) Cultural Silk armor. I do not know what the recipes are yet, though, as I've never bothered much with tradeskills.

Hopefully, this means the days of paying a minimum of 50k for a single Coarse Spider Silk are over. It'd be nice to actually find Elaborate Duskwoven for sale in the Bazaar at a reasonable price.
